headline: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods Maintains Outperform on Globe Life, Raises Price Target to $192
summary: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods  analyst Ryan Krueger   maintains Globe Life (NYSE:GL) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $180 to $192.
